rag_rules: Place assumptions in component type annexes when they describe input port constraints or output port ranges
Use assign statements in implementation annexes only for output feature bindings
Avoid placing guarantees in implementation annexes
Use exact Boolean expressions only when the port is an AGREE bool in scope
generic_rules: Use named constants or visible relations for concrete bounds in assumptions and guarantees
Align helper declaration types with the expression types
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions unless explicitly exposed as ports or constants
Use eq for equality comparisons and and/or for logical combinations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Use value_in_range : bool = value_in >= lower_limit and value_in <= upper_limit; for range checks
Use eq chosen = select_first ? input_a : input_b; for conditional selection
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantees in implementation annexes
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers
Do not encode AADL property names as AGREE variables
